name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - BitTorrent Handshake Verification Failure
notes: This rule triggers when a failed handshake verification has been observed in BitTorrent network communications.
conditions_text: when any of Suspect Content Descriptions match BitTorrent Handshake verification failure
TD_list: APPLY QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - BitTorrent Handshake Verification Failure on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of Suspect Content Descriptions match BitTorrent Handshake verification failure
RED_list: Event name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - BitTorrent Handshake Verification Failure
Event description: A failed handshake verification has been observed in BitTorrent network communications.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
